message:
test(extension_replay): add 23 edge-case tests for replay trace module

Coverage: 18 → 41 tests. New tests cover: builder edge cases (empty,
metadata, overwrite, attributes), validation errors (empty/whitespace IDs,
duplicate cancel, cancel-retry-cancel, completed-clears-cancel),
event kind ordering + serde, divergence detection (schema/attribute mismatch),
capture gate boundary values, diagnostic snapshot hints, overhead computation.

Bead: bd-2tqzj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2tn","title":"Testing: full unit coverage (no mocks) + detailed E2E integration scripts","description":"Goal: achieve full unit/integration coverage without mocks/fakes and deliver complete E2E scripts with detailed, deterministic logging.

Scope:
- Unit/integration tests use real code paths (VCR streams, real ToolRegistry, real FS/temp dirs).
- E2E scripts cover CLI, RPC, TUI, provider streaming, and extension runtime.
- Logging: JSONL logs + artifact index; normalized for diffs; redaction enforced.

Acceptance:
- All core modules have coverage tasks closed (agent, providers, tools, session/compaction, config, resources, auth, extensions).
- No mock providers in core-path tests.
- E2E scripts produce reproducible artifacts with verbose logs.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
- [ ] All child/dependent beads include unit tests + E2E scripts with JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9 (or N/A with rationale) and are closed
- [ ] Unit/integration tests cover core success/failure + edge cases across the epic scope
- [ ] E2E scripts validate user-facing workflows; logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
- [ ] Performance/UX budgets or evidence updated where applicable; regressions are detectable
- [ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
- [ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes

 {"id":"bd-2tp","title":"Unit tests: extc pipeline + compat scanner","description":"Background:
- The extc build pipeline is the JS/TS compatibility backbone; correctness is critical.

Steps:
- Unit tests for JS/TS bundling with deterministic output.
- Verify shim rewrite passes (legacy API -> connector hostcalls).
- Compat scan tests: reject Node/Bun globals and forbidden APIs.
- Cache tests: identical inputs hit cache; changes bust cache.

Logging requirements:
- Tests assert diagnostics include rejected API name + location.

Acceptance:
- Pipeline behavior is deterministic and rejects incompatible code with actionable logs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
- [ ] Unit tests cover core success/failure + edge cases for this bead
- [ ] Integration/E2E script exercises the end-to-end path (or explicitly marks N/A with rationale) and emits detailed JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9
- [ ] Logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
- [ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
- [ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes

All pass, clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-02-16T08:52:49Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2tu3","title":"Interactive: implement legacy app actions (clear/exit/suspend/externalEditor)","description":"# Goal
Implement the behavioral semantics for core legacy app actions once keybindings are routed through the action layer.

# Legacy Actions (keybindings.md)
- `interrupt`: Escape
- `clear`: Ctrl+C
- `exit`: Ctrl+D (when editor empty)
- `suspend`: Ctrl+Z
- `externalEditor`: Ctrl+G

Legacy UX also includes:
- Ctrl+C twice → quit

# Required Behavior
- Ctrl+C (idle): clear editor input (do NOT quit).
- Ctrl+C twice (within a short window): quit.
- Escape (idle): cancel current overlay/autocomplete; if nothing to cancel, do nothing (do NOT quit).
- Escape (busy): abort current request and restore queued messages (handled in message queue workstream).
- Ctrl+D:
  - if editor empty and idle → quit
  - otherwise treated as deleteCharForward in editor (or ignored depending on editor impl)
- Ctrl+Z: suspend to background (best-effort, platform dependent).
- Ctrl+G: open external editor (`$VISUAL` or `$EDITOR`), then paste result back into editor.

# Implementation Notes
- External editor behavior should write the current editor text to a temp file, spawn editor, then read file back.
- Suspending may not be supported on Windows; document limitations.

# Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] App-level key semantics match legacy behavior.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] Unit tests cover core success/failure + edge cases for this bead (add regression coverage if applicable)
[ ] Integration/E2E script exercises the end-to-end path (or explicitly marks N/A with rationale in notes) and emits detailed JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9
[ ] Logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
[ ] Any new fixtures/golden outputs are deterministic and documented
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"opus","created_at":"2026-02-03T19:53:52.887836549Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:25:05.688242577Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T20:15:13.271722487Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2tu3","depends_on_id":"bd-3ip","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:01Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2tu3","depends_on_id":"bd-gze","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:01Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":139,"issue_id":"bd-2tu3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Legacy app actions implementation complete (bd-2tu3).

**Changes to src/interactive.rs:**

1. **Added `last_ctrlc_time` field** for double-tap Ctrl+C quit detection

2. **Updated Interrupt (Escape) action:**
   - When processing: aborts request (unchanged)
   - When idle in multi-line: exits to single-line mode
   - When idle in single-line: does nothing (legacy behavior - no quit)

3. **Updated Clear/Copy (Ctrl+C) action:**
   - When processing: aborts request
   - When idle with text: clears editor, shows "Input cleared"
   - When idle without text: first tap shows "Press Ctrl+C again to quit"
   - Double-tap within 500ms: quits

4. **Updated Exit (Ctrl+D) action:**
   - Only quits when editor is empty and idle
   - With text: doesn't consume (lets TextArea handle as deleteCharForward)

5. **Added Suspend (Ctrl+Z) action:**
   - Unix: sends SIGTSTP to process, shows "Resumed from background"
   - Non-Unix: shows "Suspend not supported on this platform"

6. **Added ExternalEditor (Ctrl+G) action:**
   - Uses $VISUAL, then $EDITOR, then "vi"
   - Writes current input to temp file, spawns editor
   - Reads back edited content on exit
   - Shows error if editor fails

7. **Added `open_external_editor()` helper method**

8. **Updated `should_consume_action()`:**
   - Exit now only consumed when editor empty
   - Added Suspend and ExternalEditor

**Test changes (tests/tui_state.rs):**
- Renamed `tui_state_escape_quits_when_idle_single_line` → `tui_state_escape_does_nothing_when_idle_single_line`
- Renamed `tui_state_ctrlc_quits_when_idle` → `tui_state_ctrlc_clears_input_when_has_text`
- Added `tui_state_ctrlc_double_tap_quits_when_idle`

**Tests: All 206+ tests passing**
- 50 TUI state tests (updated for new behavior)
- 156+ library tests
","created_at":"2026-02-03T20:15:03Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2tvp","title":"Unit tests: providers/cohere.rs — V2 chat API format","description":"Add/verify unit tests for Cohere provider: (1) Request body matches Cohere V2 chat format. (2) Stream parsing handles Cohere's event types. (3) Tool definition translation. (4) Auth header construction. No mocks.","notes":"2026-02-06 SapphireDog: expanded src/providers/cohere.rs unit tests to cover (1) v2 request body shape incl system/user/tools/stream/temperature/max_tokens, (2) tool schema translation including empty-description omission, (3) streaming parsing for thinking deltas + MAX_TOKENS stop reason, (4) auth header behavior for api_key Bearer and pre-supplied Authorization header override via options.headers. Added local capture-server helpers mirroring other providers. Validation: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/sdog cargo test --lib cohere::tests; CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/sdog cargo check --all-targets; CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/sdog cargo clippy --lib -- -D warnings; cargo fmt --check -- src/providers/cohere.rs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SapphireDog","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:12:25.110687224Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T17:47:11.230868154Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T17:47:11.230769430Z","close_reason":"Completed: Cohere provider request/stream/tool/auth unit coverage added and validated","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-2tx","title":"No-mock policy enforcement (lint + CI guard)","description":"Goal:
- Enforce the no-mock policy by adding a lightweight CI guard that flags new mock/fake usage in tests, with actionable logging.

Scope:
- Define explicit allowlist rules (file + rationale) for any exceptional mocks.
- Add a fast check (rg/ast-grep) that fails CI when Mock/Fake/Stub patterns appear outside allowlist.
- Emit clear diagnostics (file:line + matched symbol) and guidance to replace with VCR/real deps.
- Document the policy and how to request/justify exceptions.

Acceptance Criteria:
- CI fails if new mocks/fakes are introduced without allowlist entry.
- Output includes exact file:line matches and remediation guidance.
- Allowlist is minimal, audited, and documented.
- Guard is fast, deterministic, and runs in CI + locally.

Dependencies:
- Leverages bd-351 audit to seed allowlist and baseline mock inventory.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] Unit tests cover core success/failure + edge cases for this bead (add regression coverage if applicable)

[ ] Any new fixtures/golden outputs are deterministic and documented
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T04:59:27.589230634Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:25:34.207195880Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T09:43:09.429120256Z","close_reason":"Completed: CI no-mock code guard + remove MockProvider","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2tx","depends_on_id":"bd-26s","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2tx","depends_on_id":"bd-351","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T00:00:02Z","created_by":"import"}]}
